rationale: Gov't Code §21.002 governs contempt of court powers and punishments. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.002. CONTEMPT OF COURT. (a) Except as provided by Subsection (g), a court may punish for contempt.
_note: Rule text concerns contempt of court; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
